# Surge Project Memory

This file stores the working context for the current Surge build.
It is automatically updated as tasks are completed.

## Structure

- Project idea and requirements
- Task plan and decomposition
- Individual task outputs
- Integration notes
- Final review

## Usage

Surge maintains this file automatically. Do not edit manually
unless you need to correct context for subsequent tasks.
